title: 「have no choice but to + 動詞」句型
titleZh: 「have no choice but to + 動詞」表達別無選擇
titleEn: Using have no choice but to to express no alternative

source.file: Sentence Structure 61 -「have no choice but to + 動詞」表達別無選擇.pdf

formula: Subject + have / has / had + no choice but to + base verb + other information

formulas.formula: Subject + have / has / had + no choice but to + base verb + other information
Subject + may / will / would + have + no choice but to + base verb

example: The file is corrupted, so we have no choice but to start again.
exampleZh: 檔案已損壞，所以我們別無選擇，只能重新開始。

examples.en: The file is corrupted, so we have no choice but to start again.
examples.zh: 檔案已損壞，所以我們別無選擇，只能重新開始。
examples.highlight: we have no choice but to start

meaning.zh: 這個句型表示在某種情況下沒有其他合理選擇，因此只能採取指定行動。

rules.en: Use have with I, you, we and they. Use has with he, she, it and a singular noun. Use had for a past situation.
rules.zh: I、you、we、they 使用 have；he、she、it 及單數名詞使用 has；過去的情況使用 had。
examples: We have no choice but to wait.
Mia has no choice but to wait.
They had no choice but to wait.

rules.en: Always use but to + base verb in this structure.
rules.zh: 這個句型中的 but 後面必須接 to + 動詞原形。
examples: We have no choice but to wait.

rules.en: Use this structure only when no reasonable alternative is available.
rules.zh: 只有在沒有其他合理選擇時，才使用這個句型；它並非用來表達個人喜好。

rules.en: The subject normally performs the action after to.
rules.zh: 句子的主語通常也是執行 to 後面動作的人或機構。
examples: The airline had no choice but to arrange hotel rooms.

rules.en: Modal verbs can show possibility, future necessity or an imagined situation.
rules.zh: 情態動詞可以表示可能性、將來的必要行動或假設情況。
examples: We may have no choice but to wait.
We will have no choice but to wait.
We would have no choice but to wait.

benefits.en: The reader immediately understands that the person is not simply choosing the action; no reasonable alternative is available.
benefits.zh: 讀者會立即明白，當事人並非純粹想這樣做，而是沒有其他合理選擇。

benefits.en: This structure is useful when you need to show that a decision was caused by the situation rather than personal preference.
benefits.zh: 當你需要說明某個決定是受到情況所迫，而不是出於個人喜好時，這個句型十分有用。

benefits.en: You can present the difficult situation first and then state the action that must follow.
benefits.zh: 你可以先交代困難情況，再說明接下來不得不採取的行動。

benefits.en: Once you know have no choice but to..., you can quickly explain decisions in conversations, essays, reports and presentations.
benefits.zh: 掌握 have no choice but to... 後，你可以在對話、作文、報告和簡報中迅速解釋決定。

benefits.en: You can use it to explain what may, will or would become necessary if a situation changes.
benefits.zh: 你可以用它說明，當情況改變時，甚麼行動可能、將會或在假設情況下變得無可避免。

en: Rewrite each sentence using have / has / had no choice but to + base verb. Use modal verbs where the meaning requires them.
Preserve the original meaning, tense, people, objects and important details.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 have / has / had no choice but to + 動詞原形 改寫以下句子。如句意需要，請保留或加入適當的情態動詞。
答案須保留原句的意思、時態、人物、物件和重要資料。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Our bus was cancelled, and waiting for the next one was our only option.
questions.promptZh: 我們乘坐的巴士班次被取消，而等候下一班是唯一的選擇。
questions.answer: We had no choice but to wait for the next bus.
questions.answerZh: 我們別無選擇，只能等候下一班巴士。
questions.highlight: We had no choice but to wait for the next bus.

questions.prompt: No taxis are available, so walking home is Mia’s only practical option.
questions.promptZh: 現時沒有的士可用，所以步行回家是米婭唯一實際可行的選擇。
questions.answer: Mia has no choice but to walk home.
questions.answerZh: 米婭別無選擇，只能步行回家。
questions.highlight: Mia has no choice but to walk home.

questions.prompt: Why did I call the doctor? There was no other safe action I could take.
questions.promptZh: 我為甚麼致電醫生？當時我沒有其他安全的做法。
questions.answer: I had no choice but to call the doctor.
questions.answerZh: 我別無選擇，只能致電醫生。
questions.highlight: I had no choice but to call the doctor.

questions.prompt: The deadline was the next morning, and finishing the project that evening was the students’ only option.
questions.promptZh: 限期是翌日早上，而學生唯一的選擇是在當晚完成項目。
questions.answer: The students had no choice but to finish the project that evening.
questions.answerZh: 學生別無選擇，只能在當晚完成項目。
questions.highlight: The students had no choice but to finish the project that evening.

questions.prompt: The broken key could not be repaired, so replacing it was Ben’s only option.
questions.promptZh: 損壞的鑰匙無法修理，所以更換鑰匙是本唯一的選擇。
questions.answer: Ben had no choice but to replace the broken key.
questions.answerZh: 本別無選擇，只能更換損壞的鑰匙。
questions.highlight: Ben had no choice but to replace the broken key.

questions.prompt: A storm was approaching, and leaving the park was our only safe action.
questions.promptZh: 暴風雨即將來臨，而離開公園是我們唯一安全的做法。
questions.answer: We had no choice but to leave the park.
questions.answerZh: 我們別無選擇，只能離開公園。
questions.highlight: We had no choice but to leave the park.

questions.prompt: The lift is out of order, and the stairs are the only available route to Chloe’s office.
questions.promptZh: 升降機發生故障，而樓梯是前往克洛伊辦公室的唯一可用路線。
questions.answer: Chloe has no choice but to use the stairs to reach her office.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊別無選擇，只能行樓梯前往辦公室。
questions.highlight: Chloe has no choice but to use the stairs to reach her office.

questions.prompt: Heavy rain continued, and their picnic could not be held indoors. Cancelling it was their only option.
questions.promptZh: 大雨持續，而他們的野餐又不能改在室內舉行。取消活動是他們唯一的選擇。
questions.answer: They had no choice but to cancel the picnic.
questions.answerZh: 他們別無選擇，只能取消野餐。
questions.highlight: They had no choice but to cancel the picnic.

questions.prompt: Your account is locked, and resetting the password is the only way to use it again.
questions.promptZh: 你的帳戶已被鎖定，而重設密碼是再次使用帳戶的唯一方法。
questions.answer: You have no choice but to reset your password to use the account again.
questions.answerZh: 你別無選擇，只能重設密碼，以再次使用帳戶。
questions.highlight: You have no choice but to reset your password to use the account again.

questions.prompt: The power failed and the shop had no emergency lighting, so closing early was the only safe option.
questions.promptZh: 電力中斷，而店舖沒有緊急照明，所以提早關門是唯一安全的選擇。
questions.answer: The shop had no choice but to close early.
questions.answerZh: 店舖別無選擇，只能提早關門。
questions.highlight: The shop had no choice but to close early.

questions.prompt: Lily forgot her pen and no spare pens were available, making borrowing one her only option.
questions.promptZh: 莉莉忘記帶筆，而現場沒有後備筆，因此借一支筆是她唯一的選擇。
questions.answer: Lily had no choice but to borrow a pen.
questions.answerZh: 莉莉別無選擇，只能借一支筆。
questions.highlight: Lily had no choice but to borrow a pen.

questions.prompt: The main road was closed, and taking another road was the only way for the driver to continue the journey.
questions.promptZh: 主要道路已封閉，而改行另一條路是司機繼續行程的唯一方法。
questions.answer: The driver had no choice but to take another road to continue the journey.
questions.answerZh: 司機別無選擇，只能改行另一條路繼續行程。
questions.highlight: The driver had no choice but to take another road to continue the journey.

questions.prompt: Our income has fallen, and reducing our spending is the only way to avoid debt.
questions.promptZh: 我們的收入已經下降，而減少開支是避免負債的唯一方法。
questions.answer: We have no choice but to reduce our spending to avoid debt.
questions.answerZh: 我們別無選擇，只能減少開支，以避免負債。
questions.highlight: We have no choice but to reduce our spending to avoid debt.

questions.prompt: Why did Jason apologise? The evidence showed that he had blamed the wrong person, and no fair alternative remained.
questions.promptZh: 傑森為甚麼道歉？證據顯示他責怪錯了人，而當時已沒有其他公平的做法。
questions.answer: Jason had no choice but to apologise.
questions.answerZh: 傑森別無選擇，只能道歉。
questions.highlight: Jason had no choice but to apologise.

questions.prompt: Every treatment room is occupied, so the nurse can only ask the patient to wait.
questions.promptZh: 所有治療室都有人使用，所以護士只能請病人等候。
questions.answer: The nurse has no choice but to ask the patient to wait.
questions.answerZh: 護士別無選擇，只能請病人等候。
questions.highlight: The nurse has no choice but to ask the patient to wait.

questions.prompt: The sports field was flooded, and the indoor hall was the only place where the team could practise.
questions.promptZh: 運動場水浸，而室內體育館是球隊唯一可以練習的地方。
questions.answer: The team had no choice but to practise indoors.
questions.answerZh: 球隊別無選擇，只能在室內練習。
questions.highlight: The team had no choice but to practise indoors.

questions.prompt: My device has no free storage, and deleting some unused files is the only way to install the update.
questions.promptZh: 我的裝置沒有剩餘儲存空間，而刪除一些不用的檔案是安裝更新的唯一方法。
questions.answer: I have no choice but to delete some unused files to install the update.
questions.answerZh: 我別無選擇，只能刪除一些不用的檔案，以安裝更新。
questions.highlight: I have no choice but to delete some unused files to install the update.

questions.prompt: The dress was the wrong size and the shop had no replacement, making returning it Sarah’s only option.
questions.promptZh: 這條裙的尺碼不合適，而店舖沒有可供更換的貨品，因此退回裙子是莎拉唯一的選擇。
questions.answer: Sarah had no choice but to return the dress.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉別無選擇，只能退回這條裙。
questions.highlight: Sarah had no choice but to return the dress.

questions.prompt: A burst pipe made the family’s home unsafe, and a hotel was the only available place to stay that night.
questions.promptZh: 爆裂的水管令這個家庭的住所變得不安全，而酒店是當晚唯一可入住的地方。
questions.answer: The family had no choice but to stay in a hotel for the night.
questions.answerZh: 這個家庭別無選擇，只能在酒店住一晚。
questions.highlight: The family had no choice but to stay in a hotel for the night.

questions.prompt: You need to enter the secure area, but the staff at the entrance will not admit anyone without identification.
questions.promptZh: 你需要進入保安區域，但入口的職員不會讓沒有身分證明的人進入。
questions.answer: You have no choice but to show your identification at the entrance.
questions.answerZh: 你別無選擇，只能在入口出示身分證明。
questions.highlight: You have no choice but to show your identification at the entrance.

questions.prompt: Engineers found serious leaks in the school roof, and repairing it before winter is the school’s only safe plan.
questions.promptZh: 工程師發現學校屋頂嚴重漏水，而在冬季前修理屋頂是學校唯一安全的方案。
questions.answer: The school has no choice but to repair the roof before winter.
questions.answerZh: 學校別無選擇，只能在冬季前修理屋頂。
questions.highlight: The school has no choice but to repair the roof before winter.

questions.prompt: Why did Olivia take the later train? Her first train was full, and the later train was the only remaining service.
questions.promptZh: 奧莉花為甚麼乘搭較後的火車？她原本要乘搭的班次已滿，而較後的班次是唯一剩下的服務。
questions.answer: Olivia had no choice but to take the later train.
questions.answerZh: 奧莉花別無選擇，只能乘搭較後的火車。
questions.highlight: Olivia had no choice but to take the later train.

questions.prompt: The manager learnt that two speakers were absent and no replacements were available, so postponing the meeting was the only workable option.
questions.promptZh: 經理得知兩名講者缺席，而且現場沒有替代人選，所以押後會議是唯一可行的選擇。
questions.answer: The manager had no choice but to postpone the meeting.
questions.answerZh: 經理別無選擇，只能押後會議。
questions.highlight: The manager had no choice but to postpone the meeting.

questions.prompt: If the supplier cannot deliver tomorrow, asking the client for more time may be our only realistic option.
questions.promptZh: 如果供應商明天無法交貨，向客戶要求更多時間可能是我們唯一實際可行的選擇。
questions.answer: If the supplier cannot deliver tomorrow, we may have no choice but to ask the client for more time.
questions.answerZh: 如果供應商明天無法交貨，我們可能別無選擇，只能向客戶要求更多時間。
questions.highlight: If the supplier cannot deliver tomorrow, we may have no choice but to ask the client for more time.

questions.prompt: Engineers say the damaged bridge is unsafe, and completely limiting access is the council’s only responsible action.
questions.promptZh: 工程師表示受損橋樑並不安全，而全面限制通行是市議會唯一負責任的做法。
questions.answer: The council has no choice but to limit access to the damaged bridge.
questions.answerZh: 市議會別無選擇，只能限制人們使用受損的橋樑。
questions.highlight: The council has no choice but to limit access to the damaged bridge.

questions.prompt: All the shops were closed and Ethan’s guests were arriving soon, so he could only cook with the ingredients he had.
questions.promptZh: 所有店舖都已關門，而伊森的客人很快便會到達，所以他只能使用現有的食材煮食。
questions.answer: Ethan had no choice but to cook with the ingredients he had.
questions.answerZh: 伊森別無選擇，只能使用現有的食材煮食。
questions.highlight: Ethan had no choice but to cook with the ingredients he had.

questions.prompt: The alarm sounded and the staff ordered an immediate evacuation, so the passengers could only leave the train.
questions.promptZh: 警報響起，而職員下令立即疏散，所以乘客只能離開火車。
questions.answer: The passengers had no choice but to leave the train.
questions.answerZh: 乘客別無選擇，只能離開火車。
questions.highlight: The passengers had no choice but to leave the train.

questions.prompt: The optician said Grace could not drive safely without glasses, making them her only safe option when driving.
questions.promptZh: 視光師表示，格蕾絲不戴眼鏡便不能安全駕駛，因此駕駛時戴眼鏡是她唯一安全的選擇。
questions.answer: Grace has no choice but to wear glasses when driving.
questions.answerZh: 格蕾絲別無選擇，只能在駕駛時戴眼鏡。
questions.highlight: Grace has no choice but to wear glasses when driving.

questions.prompt: The company discovered that the product was unsafe and no replacement was available, making a full refund the only acceptable solution.
questions.promptZh: 公司發現產品並不安全，而且亦沒有替代貨品，因此全數退款是唯一可接受的解決方法。
questions.answer: The company had no choice but to refund the customers in full.
questions.answerZh: 公司別無選擇，只能向顧客全數退款。
questions.highlight: The company had no choice but to refund the customers in full.

questions.prompt: Why did I admit my mistake? The security camera clearly showed what had happened, so denying it was no longer possible.
questions.promptZh: 我為甚麼承認自己的錯誤？保安攝影機清楚拍下了事情經過，所以我已無法否認。
questions.answer: I had no choice but to admit my mistake.
questions.answerZh: 我別無選擇，只能承認自己的錯誤。
questions.highlight: I had no choice but to admit my mistake.

questions.prompt: If the rain continues, cancelling the match will be our only safe option.
questions.promptZh: 如果大雨持續，取消比賽將會是我們唯一安全的選擇。
questions.answer: If the rain continues, we will have no choice but to cancel the match.
questions.answerZh: 如果大雨持續，我們將別無選擇，只能取消比賽。
questions.highlight: If the rain continues, we will have no choice but to cancel the match.

questions.prompt: A water pipe burst and made the hospital ward unsafe, so moving the patients to another ward was the hospital’s only way to protect them.
questions.promptZh: 一條水管爆裂，令醫院病房變得不安全，所以把病人轉移到另一個病房是醫院保護他們的唯一方法。
questions.answer: The hospital had no choice but to move the patients to another ward.
questions.answerZh: 醫院別無選擇，只能把病人轉移到另一個病房。
questions.highlight: The hospital had no choice but to move the patients to another ward.

questions.prompt: You have tried every other solution, but the computer is frozen and none of the commands work, so restarting it may be your only option.
questions.promptZh: 你已嘗試所有其他解決方法，但電腦已停止回應，而且所有指令都無法運作，所以重新啟動電腦可能是你唯一的選擇。
questions.answer: You may have no choice but to restart the computer.
questions.answerZh: 你可能別無選擇，只能重新啟動電腦。
questions.highlight: You may have no choice but to restart the computer.

questions.prompt: Because the storm delayed the event and the venue had a fixed closing time, the organisers could finish on time only by shortening the programme.
questions.promptZh: 由於暴風雨令活動延誤，而場地有固定的關閉時間，主辦單位只有縮短節目，才能準時完成活動。
questions.answer: The organisers had no choice but to shorten the programme to finish on time.
questions.answerZh: 主辦單位別無選擇，只能縮短節目，以準時完成活動。
questions.highlight: The organisers had no choice but to shorten the programme to finish on time.

questions.prompt: Why did Maya ask a stranger for directions? Her phone battery was dead, and there were no signs nearby.
questions.promptZh: 瑪雅為甚麼向陌生人問路？她的電話沒有電，而附近亦沒有路牌。
questions.answer: Maya had no choice but to ask a stranger for directions.
questions.answerZh: 瑪雅別無選擇，只能向陌生人問路。
questions.highlight: Maya had no choice but to ask a stranger for directions.

questions.prompt: The supplier recalled an important ingredient and no safe substitute was available, making removal of the dish the restaurant’s only option.
questions.promptZh: 供應商回收了一種重要食材，而餐廳沒有安全的替代品，因此把該菜式從餐牌中移除是餐廳唯一的選擇。
questions.answer: The restaurant has no choice but to remove the dish from the menu.
questions.answerZh: 餐廳別無選擇，只能把該菜式從餐牌中移除。
questions.highlight: The restaurant has no choice but to remove the dish from the menu.

questions.prompt: The hotel found us a room at the last minute. Without that room, sleeping at the airport would have been our only option.
questions.promptZh: 酒店在最後一刻為我們找到房間。要是沒有那個房間，在機場過夜便會是我們唯一的選擇。
questions.answer: Without that room, we would have had no choice but to sleep at the airport.
questions.answerZh: 要是沒有那個房間，我們便會別無選擇，只能在機場過夜。
questions.highlight: Without that room, we would have had no choice but to sleep at the airport.

questions.prompt: The farmer could no longer afford to feed all his animals, so selling some of them was the only way to keep the farm operating.
questions.promptZh: 農夫已無法負擔飼養所有動物的費用，所以出售其中一些動物是讓農場繼續運作的唯一方法。
questions.answer: The farmer had no choice but to sell some of his animals to keep the farm operating.
questions.answerZh: 農夫別無選擇，只能出售其中一些動物，讓農場繼續運作。
questions.highlight: The farmer had no choice but to sell some of his animals to keep the farm operating.

questions.prompt: Visitor numbers exceed the gallery’s safety limit, so restricting admission is the museum’s only responsible option.
questions.promptZh: 訪客人數超出展覽廳的安全上限，所以限制入場人數是博物館唯一負責任的選擇。
questions.answer: The museum has no choice but to restrict the number of visitors.
questions.answerZh: 博物館別無選擇，只能限制訪客人數。
questions.highlight: The museum has no choice but to restrict the number of visitors.

questions.prompt: My first exam paper was lost and the school cannot give me a grade without another completed paper, making retaking the exam my only option.
questions.promptZh: 我的第一份試卷遺失了，而學校沒有另一份完成的試卷便不能給我成績，因此重新應考是我唯一的選擇。
questions.answer: I have no choice but to take the exam again.
questions.answerZh: 我別無選擇，只能再次應考。
questions.highlight: I have no choice but to take the exam again.

questions.prompt: The reading-room ceiling is unsafe and the room cannot reopen before repairs, making continued closure the library’s only safe choice.
questions.promptZh: 閱覽室的天花板並不安全，而房間在完成維修前不能重開，因此繼續關閉閱覽室是圖書館唯一安全的選擇。
questions.answer: The library has no choice but to close the reading room until the ceiling is repaired.
questions.answerZh: 圖書館別無選擇，只能關閉閱覽室，直至天花板完成維修。
questions.highlight: The library has no choice but to close the reading room until the ceiling is repaired.

questions.prompt: The road became impassable and vehicles could go no farther, so continuing on foot was the rescue team’s only way to reach the village.
questions.promptZh: 道路變得無法通行，而車輛不能再向前，所以徒步繼續前進是救援隊到達村莊的唯一方法。
questions.answer: The rescue team had no choice but to continue on foot to reach the village.
questions.answerZh: 救援隊別無選擇，只能徒步繼續前進，以到達村莊。
questions.highlight: The rescue team had no choice but to continue on foot to reach the village.

questions.prompt: Unless more volunteers join, reducing its weekend services will be the charity’s only realistic response.
questions.promptZh: 除非有更多義工加入，否則減少週末服務將會是慈善機構唯一實際可行的做法。
questions.answer: Unless more volunteers join, the charity will have no choice but to reduce its weekend services.
questions.answerZh: 除非有更多義工加入，否則慈善機構將別無選擇，只能減少週末服務。
questions.highlight: Unless more volunteers join, the charity will have no choice but to reduce its weekend services.

questions.prompt: The flight was cancelled overnight and no later service was available, making hotel rooms the airline’s only practical way to support the stranded passengers.
questions.promptZh: 航班在晚上被取消，而其後沒有其他班次，因此安排酒店房間是航空公司協助滯留乘客的唯一實際做法。
questions.answer: The airline had no choice but to arrange hotel rooms for the stranded passengers.
questions.answerZh: 航空公司別無選擇，只能為滯留乘客安排酒店房間。
questions.highlight: The airline had no choice but to arrange hotel rooms for the stranded passengers.

questions.prompt: Student numbers remain low and the school’s budget may not support two separate classes next term, so combining them may become its only workable option.
questions.promptZh: 學生人數持續偏低，而學校下學期的預算可能不足以維持兩個獨立班別，所以合併兩班可能成為校方唯一可行的選擇。
questions.answer: The school may have no choice but to combine the two small classes next term.
questions.answerZh: 學校下學期可能別無選擇，只能合併兩個小班。
questions.highlight: The school may have no choice but to combine the two small classes next term.

questions.prompt: The engineers’ tests showed that the control panel was unsafe and its individual parts could not be repaired, so replacing the whole panel was their only solution.
questions.promptZh: 工程師的測試顯示控制面板並不安全，而個別零件亦無法修理，所以更換整個面板是他們唯一的解決方法。
questions.answer: The engineers had no choice but to replace the entire control panel.
questions.answerZh: 工程師別無選擇，只能更換整個控制面板。
questions.highlight: The engineers had no choice but to replace the entire control panel.

questions.prompt: Several confidential documents were missing, and company policy required us to report this to the manager immediately without delay.
questions.promptZh: 數份機密文件不見了，而公司政策要求我們立即向經理報告，不得延誤。
questions.answer: We had no choice but to report the missing documents to the manager immediately.
questions.answerZh: 我們別無選擇，只能立即向經理報告文件不見一事。
questions.highlight: We had no choice but to report the missing documents to the manager immediately.

questions.prompt: The local clinic lacks the specialist and equipment needed for this treatment, so referring the patient to a larger hospital is the only safe course.
questions.promptZh: 本地診所欠缺進行這項治療所需的專科醫生和設備，所以把病人轉介到較大型醫院是唯一安全的做法。
questions.answer: The local clinic has no choice but to refer the patient to a larger hospital.
questions.answerZh: 本地診所別無選擇，只能把病人轉介到較大型的醫院。
questions.highlight: The local clinic has no choice but to refer the patient to a larger hospital.

questions.prompt: If the hall became unavailable, moving the event online would be the organisers’ only way to hold it.
questions.promptZh: 如果禮堂無法使用，把活動改為網上舉行便會是主辦單位繼續舉行活動的唯一方法。
questions.answer: If the hall became unavailable, the organisers would have no choice but to move the event online.
questions.answerZh: 如果禮堂無法使用，主辦單位便會別無選擇，只能把活動改為網上舉行。
questions.highlight: If the hall became unavailable, the organisers would have no choice but to move the event online.

questions.prompt: The research team discovered that the temperature records were incomplete, so the results could not be trusted. Repeating the experiment was the only scientifically sound action.
questions.promptZh: 研究團隊發現溫度紀錄並不完整，所以研究結果不能令人信服。重做實驗是唯一符合科學原則的做法。
questions.answer: The research team had no choice but to repeat the experiment after discovering that the temperature records were incomplete.
questions.answerZh: 研究團隊發現溫度紀錄並不完整後，別無選擇，只能重做實驗。
questions.highlight: The research team had no choice but to repeat the experiment after discovering that the temperature records were incomplete.
